product_overview: Next-Events is a Next.js 14 event listing web app that lets users register, create, edit, and browse events with image uploads and search. It uses NextAuth for authentication, Uploadthing for file uploads, and a MongoDB backend accessed via server actions.
core_goals: Provide a simple authentication flow (sign up, login, sign out) with protected routes for user-specific actions.
Allow authenticated users to create, update, and delete events with image uploads and date pickers.
Make browsing and discovering events easy through a searchable home page and detailed event pages with related events.
Keep the UX responsive with client-side form validation, toast notifications, and debounce search behavior.

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Register a new account with name, email, and password. The app attempts to auto-sign-in and redirect to the profile page after creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (min 6 characters) -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> See toast notification on success -> Auto-signs in and redirect to /profile

Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field that already exists -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> See toast error notification about duplicate email -> Stay on /signup

Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button to submit -> See toast notification on success -> Redirect attempt fails due to missing router variable -> Remain on /signup

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email and password via NextAuth credentials provider.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Log In button to submit -> See toast success message -> Redirect to /profile
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (incorrect) -> Click Log In button to submit -> See toast error message about invalid credentials -> Remain on /login

features.name: User Sign Out
features.description: Sign out the authenticated user via the navbar avatar dropdown.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click avatar in navbar to open dropdown -> Click Sign Out option -> See toast confirming sign out -> Navbar updates to show Login and Sign Up links
Navigate to / -> Click avatar in navbar to open dropdown -> Click Sign Out option -> Sign out API returns error -> See toast error message -> User remains authenticated

features.name: Browse Events
features.description: View all events on the home page displayed as cards with summary information and a Learn More action.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View event cards with title, category, date, description, and image -> Click Learn More button on an event card -> Navigate to /events/[id]
Navigate to / -> No event cards are displayed -> See message indicating no events found

features.name: Search Events
features.description: Search events by title using a debounced text input in the navbar to filter the home page list.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type search term in search input in navbar -> Wait 1 second for debounce -> See event cards filtered by title matching search term
Navigate to / -> Type search term that matches no events in search input -> Wait 1 second for debounce -> See no event cards displayed or 'no results' state

features.name: View Event Detail
features.description: Inspect full details for an event including organizer info, dates, location, description, related events, and organizer controls when applicable.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/[id] -> View event image, title, category, organizer name, dates, location, description -> Click Visit Event Website button -> External URL opens in new tab -> Scroll to related events section -> View related events by same category
Navigate to /events/[nonexistent-id] -> See an event not found or 404 message
Navigate to /events/[id] as non-organizer -> View event details -> Do not see Edit and Delete buttons

features.name: Create Event
features.description: Authenticated users can create new events with metadata, dates, description, and an uploaded image.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/create -> Fill event title input -> Select category from dropdown (Wellness, Social Club, Technology) -> Fill location input -> Fill URL input -> Select start date and time via date picker -> Select end date and time via date picker -> Upload event image via drag-and-drop or file picker -> Fill description textarea -> Click Submit button -> See toast success -> Redirect to /events/[new-id]
Navigate to /events/create -> Leave required fields blank or set invalid date range -> Click Submit button -> See validation errors displayed -> Remain on /events/create
Navigate to /events/create -> Fill required fields -> Upload event image -> Image upload API returns error -> See toast error about upload failure -> Remain on /events/create

features.name: Update Event
features.description: Event organizers can edit an existing event via a pre-filled form and optionally change the image.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/[id]/update as organizer -> Edit pre-filled event form fields -> Optionally upload a new image -> Click Submit button -> See toast success -> Redirect to /events/[id]
Navigate to /events/[id]/update as non-organizer -> Attempt to access update route -> Middleware denies access or redirects -> See message indicating insufficient permissions
Navigate to /events/[id]/update -> Edit form with invalid data -> Click Submit button -> See validation errors -> Remain on /events/[id]/update

features.name: Delete Event
features.description: Organizers can delete their events from the event detail page (or card), with confirmation and page revalidation.
user_flows: Navigate to /events/[id] as organizer -> Click Delete button on event detail page -> Confirm deletion in modal dialog -> Event is removed -> Page revalidates and redirects to /
Navigate to /events/[id] as organizer -> Click Delete button -> Cancel in confirmation modal -> Event remains and modal closes
Navigate to /events/[id] as non-organizer -> Attempt to delete via UI or API -> See error or no delete control visible -> Event remains

features.name: Update Profile
features.description: Authenticated users can update their display name and profile picture on their profile page.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Edit name input field -> Upload new profile picture -> Click Update button -> See toast success notification -> Navbar avatar updates to new picture
Navigate to /profile -> Upload new profile picture -> Image upload API returns error -> See toast error -> Profile is not updated
Navigate to /profile when unauthenticated -> Middleware redirects to /login

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Persistent navbar with logo, search, and auth-dependent menu items, with mobile-friendly behaviors.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Next-Events logo in navbar -> Click Next-Events logo to go home
Navigate to / when unauthenticated -> See Login and Sign Up links in navbar
Navigate to / when authenticated -> Click avatar in navbar to open dropdown -> See Profile, Create Event, and Sign Out options
On mobile, navigate to / -> Click search icon -> Search dropdown toggles open -> Type search term -> Wait 1 second for debounce -> See filtered results
On mobile, click search icon -> Search dropdown fails to open due to JS error -> Search input is not accessible

routes.description: Home page displaying all events with search functionality
User login page with email and password credentials
User profile page showing user info form and user's events
Event detail page with related events
Update an existing event (only by event organizer)

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Register a new account with name, email, and password. Auto-signs in after successful registration.
user_interactions: Fill name input field
Fill email input field
Fill password input field (min 6 characters)
Click Sign Up button to submit
See toast notification on success or error (duplicate email)

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials via NextAuth
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Log In button to submit
See toast success message and redirect to profile on success
See toast error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Sign Out
features.description: Sign out via navbar dropdown menu
user_interactions: Click avatar in navbar to open dropdown
Click Sign Out option

features.name: Browse Events
features.description: View all events on the home page displayed as cards
user_interactions: View event cards with title, category, date, description, and image
Click Learn More button to navigate to event detail page

features.name: Search Events
features.description: Search events by title using debounced text input in navbar
user_interactions: Type search term in search input in navbar
Results update automatically after 1 second debounce

features.name: View Event Detail
features.description: View full event details including organizer, dates, location, description, and related events
user_interactions: View event image, title, category, organizer name, dates, location, description
Click Visit Event Website button to open external URL
View related events by same category at the bottom
If organizer, see Edit and Delete buttons

features.name: Create Event
features.description: Create a new event with title, category, location, URL, dates, description, and image upload
user_interactions: Fill event title input
Select category from dropdown (Wellness, Social Club, Technology)
Fill location input
Fill URL input
Select start date and time via date picker
Select end date and time via date picker
Upload event image via drag-and-drop or file picker
Fill description textarea
Click Submit button
See toast success and redirect to event detail page
See validation errors if required fields are missing

features.name: Update Event
features.description: Update an existing event (only available to the event organizer)
user_interactions: Edit pre-filled event form fields
Optionally upload a new image
Click Submit button
See toast success and redirect to updated event detail page

features.name: Delete Event
features.description: Delete an event from event detail page or event card (organizer only)
user_interactions: Click Delete button on event detail page or event card
Confirm deletion in modal dialog (on event card)
Event is removed and page revalidates

features.name: Update Profile
features.description: Update user name and profile picture on profile page
user_interactions: Edit name input field
Upload new profile picture
Click Update button
See toast success notification
Navbar avatar updates to new picture

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Navbar with logo, search, and auth-dependent menu items
user_interactions: Click Next-Events logo to go home
When unauthenticated, see Login and Sign Up links
When authenticated, see avatar dropdown with Profile, Create Event, and Sign Out
On mobile, click search icon to toggle search dropdown

known_limitations.issue: SignUpForm references undefined router variable (missing useRouter import)
known_limitations.impact: Redirect after sign up may fail at runtime
